calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Continued To Jul-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Brian Johnson, Esq. 415-926-7247 Seven Hills LLP() for Plaintiff.
Bailee Pelham, Esq. 949.760.1121 BUCHALTER for Defendant SUNSET HEALTHCARE SOLUTIONS, INC.

ARGUED. The Court shares its comments. Plaintiff's counsel Mr. Johnson contests and presents argument. Defense counsel Ms. Pelham responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SUNSET HEALTHCARE SOLUTIONS, INC.'s MOTION TO TRANSFER.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Sanctions reduced to $3,060.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
